notes: Pinned OCI SDK contract: GetOrganization, ListOrganizations, UpdateOrganization, GetWorkRequest, ListWorkRequests, ListWorkRequestErrors, and ListWorkRequestLogs are present in v65.110.0. CreateOrganization and DeleteOrganization are not exposed, and UpdateOrganization returns only opc-request-id plus opc-work-request-id headers rather than an Organization body.

Pinned provider coverage is unconfirmed. formal/sources.lock still points at github.com/oracle/terraform-provider-oci@eb653febb1bab4cc6650a96d404a8baf36fdf671, but the accessible provider inventory did not expose a matching Organization resource or data source. The providerResource and datasource names therefore stay provisional OCI-style placeholders, and the checked-in mutability docs fixture is a conservative repo-authored fallback because the live registry page does not expose a deterministic argument-reference HTML body.

Repo-authored runtime contract is narrower than the visible SDK surface: the published kind is bind-existing plus update-only, binds by explicit organizationId or a unique ListOrganizations match on compartmentId, updates only defaultUcmSubscriptionId, resumes update through GetWorkRequest, and treats CR delete as local unbind without calling OrganizationTenancy helpers.
